steps.title: Spot the paradox
steps.content: The report proposed far more mitigation measures for birds than arthropods, yet conservationists were satisfied it would protect all wildlife. What explains this approval?

steps.title: Find the logical bridge
steps.content:
Bird-protective measures that also minimize arthropod effects explain the conservationists' approval. The other three choices either address irrelevant factors (B's bird-species variation, C's documentation levels) or contradict the approval (D's potential harm to arthropods).
That matches choice A — A is correct.
